title: User Registration
story: As a new user, I want to create an account, so that I can access the system
acceptance_criteria: The system allows new users to create an account with valid email and password
The system displays a success message on valid registration
The system displays error messages on invalid input

title: Secure Login
story: As a registered user, I want to log in securely, so that I can access my account
acceptance_criteria: The system authenticates registered users with valid credentials
The system redirects to the dashboard on successful login
The system displays an error message on failed login attempt

title: Password Reset
story: As a user, I want to reset my forgotten password, so that I can regain access to my account
acceptance_criteria: The system sends a reset link to the user's email
The system allows the user to set a new password within the expiry time
The system updates the user's password successfully

title: Profile Management
story: As a user, I want to update my profile, so that I can keep my information up-to-date
acceptance_criteria: The system allows users to edit their name and phone number
The system validates phone number to ensure it is 10 digits
The system updates the user's profile immediately

title: Account Lockout
story: As a user, I want the system to lock my account after multiple failed login attempts, so that my account is secure
acceptance_criteria: The system locks the user's account after 5 failed login attempts
The system unlocks the user's account after 15 minutes

title: Data Security
story: As a user, I want the system to keep my data secure, so that my information is protected
acceptance_criteria: The system does not expose sensitive data in API

title: System Performance
story: As a user, I want the system to respond quickly, so that I can use it efficiently
acceptance_criteria: The system responds to API requests within 2 seconds

title: System Scalability
story: As a user, I want the system to support a large number of users, so that it can handle high traffic

title: System Reliability
story: As a user, I want the system to be available at all times, so that I can use it whenever I need to
acceptance_criteria: The system uptime is greater than or equal to 99%
